para_trans: All India Technical Education from the academic year 2026-27
Pursuant to the approval given by the Council, New Delhi,
In the name of the existing Institute of Engineering Diploma course
to approve the change.
Government of Maharashtra
Department of Higher and Technical Education,
Mantralaya Extension Building, Madame Cama Marg,
Martyr Rajguru Chowk, Mumbai 400032.
Date: 10 July 2026.
Reference: - 1. Letter from All India Council for Technical Education, New Delhi. 29.04.2026 .
Letter No. of the Director, Directorate of Technical Education, Maharashtra State, Mumbai
10 / Diploma / Name Change / 5420/2026-27 253, dated 11.06.2026.
The Proposal: -
Recognition by All India Council for Technical Education, New Delhi from the academic year 2026-27
Accordingly, a proposal to change the name of the institute to the existing Diploma in Engineering course has been mooted.
The Director, Directorate of Technical Education has submitted the same to the Government through a letter under reference.
The Government's Decisions:
The academic year is as per the recognition given by the All India Council for Technical Education, New Delhi.
Regarding the change in the name of the institute from 2026-27 to the existing engineering diploma course.
According to the agreement, the following terms and conditions and conditions as indicated in the accompanying attachment shall apply:
Subject to government approval.

will be limited.
